meta.title: South Asia Expert Series: Mr. Gordon Chang, Part 1
meta.description: Gordon Chang answers our questions on China's economy, its shift from manufacturing to services, and its unused infrastructure problem. Video by Hudson Institute's South Asia Program interns.
